reviews.review_description: 4.8 stars from me! I think the game is worth it. I haven't noticed the ball going through paddles or anything. I can't sit and play this game for a long time, but its always fun to play a few rounds. Lots of challenges. If you like pinball, you'll like this.

reviews.review_title: Great game but you can’t pause
reviews.review_description:
I was going to give this a full 5 stars as this is an awesome and fun spin on pinball!
Unfortunately…I was playing a table for quite awhile and racking up a good score when the phone rang, so I pressed the button that pauses on every other game I have (I have a lot) and instead it just booted me out to the main screen and all my work was lost! I still haven’t done that well since. 
So great game but if you need to take a break for any reason you’re screwed.

Revised:
Was a glitch as later it paused ok. So I upgraded to four stars. The only reason I’m not doing a five is that I’m still a bit weary if it will happen again.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!! 😊 Nice to hear you’re enjoying the game.
Feel free to join our community to share your experience and stay updated! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_title: Pinball - But Not As You Know It
reviews.review_description:
This game is so much fun. If you love pinball like me then you can't go wrong with this fantastic game. Pinball meets tennis. You are basically the flippers with rackets to hit the ball and keep it in play. Currently there are two tables with a third due soon. It doesn't sound a lot but there is so much to do on each table. Mini games to play and missions to achieve. I have spent hours trying to beat my high score and work my way up the leaderboard. It's also a surprising work out on the higher intensity levels. That ball can move!! Thanks to the game developers for this brilliant game. Can't wait for the Western table and hopefully more to come. Just buy it, you won't be disappointed.

Update. I am loving this game even more now. Since my last review we have the Western table and now Speed added for free. Amazing. I can't decide which table I like the best. They are all so different and lots of fun to play. You really get a good workout once that ball gets moving especially with multi ball. One of my most played games on the Quest 3. Just one thing to the developers, any chance of more than 2 skip tokens for the missions? I hope you guys keep supporting the game and make more tables. Thanks devs. A solid 10/10 from me.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review! 😊 We're thrilled you're enjoying all the tables and having so much fun.

Feel free to join our community to share your experience and stay updated! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_title: Great take on filling a gap
reviews.review_description:
This game is what it promises. You're in a pinball machine playing as the bumpers. It's crisp with exactly what you'd expect from that.  IDK if there are already games like this or there but this one works.

What took me by surprise was I started with the racket, thinking the hand bumper things were weird and some gimmick. And while the racket delivers insane power, the fist bumpers made so much sense when I understood they required I punch in the direction I want it to go instead of trying to bump it deflect it. 

I'm also too impatient for tutorials or manuals, those are for if I reach an impassable problem. 

Otherwise I feel this has a lot of potential and is ripe for dlc. Definitely worth the $12 for the game in it's current iteration though. I would love to see what a multi tiered feels like if that ever becomes possible.

I should also add that I've always enjoyed pinball and the most frustrating thing was the limit of my control. You get two arms that move 60° on their respective axis. That always felt like having my hands tied. This addresses that perfectly.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the review!! 😊 Really glad to hear you’re enjoying the game.

Feel free to join our community to share your experience and stay updated! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_description: I love this game, it’s so much fun. I hope the team keeps adding tables each one is so different with so many cool things to do.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the review!! 😊 Nice to hear you’re enjoying the game.
Feel free to join our community to share your experience and stay updated! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_description: I am super excited about this magnificent hidden gem, Racket Pinball. This game is in my top three perfect games to play, and play, and keep playing. Imagine being INSIDE a pinball machine but you are the flippers. The flippers are replaced with two rackets in your hands. There are so many activities to explore in this game besides achieving high score, such as a variety of minigames. There is an option to complete special missions on the missions board to learn how to unlock the minigames which allows you to earn trophies, multiplier and bonus points. There are three pinball machines to immerse yourself into, Pirates, Space, and Wild West. I'm telling you folks, don't hold out on this one. I promise, this game is amazing with beautiful graphics and sounds. Come join me on the leaderboard! Check out my video on YT @misschiefvr.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review! 😊 We're thrilled you're enjoying the game and having so much fun.

reviews.review_description:
I totally love this. It is heaps of fun and a good way to get yourself moving. The graphics and physics are excellent and I like the music and commentary. It’s my new obsession. If you don’t get this game you are definitely missing out! 
Thank you to the developers.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review! 😊 We're thrilled you're enjoying the game and having so much fun. Feel free to join our community to stay updated and connect with other players! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_description:
This game is top, getting through the missions and unlocking all achievements on all 4 tables is quite challenging, and playing with bumpers instead of rackets is definitely a harder physical excercise. Every table has its unique cool atmosphere, and a new table has been added just recently.
The developers are responsive (there is a group on Facebook), reported bugs are getting fixed in reasonable time.
I hope there will be even more tables in the future, even as DLC for _reasonable_ price. 
I bought the game when it was on sale, but it definitely worth even the full price.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the game. 🎮😊

reviews.review_title: Interesting but terrible AI art all over
reviews.review_description: Mechanically reminds me of the old light gun shooting galleries at theme park arcades, but unfortunately every direction and seemingly every UI screen has AI art all over it so I genuinely can't look at this. Regret the purchase, looking into if refund is possible.

I tried the trial and really enjoyed it so I went ahead and purchased it. Just played again with the rackets rather than the bumper and got the frustration of the ball just going straight thru the racket without slowing down.
Yeah I had seen it mentioned in reviews but this is my first experience of it happening.
Is it because I usually play with the bumpers rather than the rackets? Will this get fixed anytime soon? 
Also is it a glitch or just part of play for the ball to swerve around/ over the racket sometimes?

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! 🙌🎉 If you’d like, you’re very welcome to join our community and follow development updates🎮💥

reviews.review_description: This game shows how to use VR in a good way.  Instead of trying to pretend you're using a pinball machine, you interact with the world in a way that makes sense with VR controls.  It's very well done

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and for the review! 😊 Glad to hear you’re enjoying the game.

Feel free to join our community to share your experience and stay updated! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_title: This game is definitely worth your time.
reviews.review_description:
Racketball VR is an incredibly immersive and physically engaging experience that really showcases what virtual reality is capable of. From the moment you step onto the court, the sense of presence is impressive—you genuinely feel like you're inside a real racquetball arena.
The controls are intuitive and responsive, making it easy to pick up whether you're new to VR or already experienced. The physics are one of the standout features: the ball movement, rebounds, and angles feel natural and realistic, which adds a satisfying level of depth to gameplay.
What really sets this game apart is how active it is. It’s not just a game—it’s a workout. You’ll find yourself moving, reacting, and sweating as you try to keep up with increasingly challenging rallies. It’s a great blend of fun and fitness.
Visually, the environments are clean and functional, keeping the focus on gameplay rather than distractions. Audio cues also help with timing and positioning, enhancing the overall immersion.
If there’s one area for improvement, it would be expanding content—more environments, game modes, or customization options would add even more replay value. But even as it stands, the core experience is strong and addictive.
Overall: Racketball VR delivers a highly enjoyable, realistic, and physically engaging sports experience. Whether you're looking to have fun or get a solid workout, this game is definitely worth your time.
⭐ Rating: 8.5/10

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! 🙌 If you’d like, you’re very welcome to join our community and follow development updates.

reviews.review_title: A Fresh and Addictive Twist on Pinball
reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game, it’s incredibly fun. I downloaded the trial first, and within about five minutes I knew I’d be getting the full version.

During the trial, I used the rackets and didn’t even notice the bumper option at first. Now that I’ve tried both, it’s really fun to mix up the gameplay.

I have noticed that the ball occasionally slips through the racket. At first, I assumed it was just me missing hits, but it seems like it might be a minor issue.

I also experienced what may be a small glitch when first booting up the game where my height was bizarrely tall. Stepping out of the play zone and back in fixed it for me.

Overall, this game is a very cool twist on pinball. I’m excited to see how it evolves and what the developers do next. I’m also looking forward to trying Speed.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the fantastic review! 🙌🎉If you’d like, you’re very welcome to join our community and follow development updates.

reviews.review_description:
5 stars for game development graphics etc all that is 5stars including gameplay. 

The reason I only gave it 2 stars is because you only get about 3 games and you can pick different difficulty settings but theres not a large library of games and you just stay station led in that one spot what’s the point of the whole scenario of showing stairs etc you can’t interact with anything and you jjst get about 3 tables not really worth the purchase no add ons either smh
fun accident workout game! very interesting like being inside pinball game with as the flippers but instead you use the rackets.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! 🙌🎉If you’d like, you’re very welcome to join our community and follow development updates

reviews.review_description: This is an awesome game! I’ve been playing it now for months almost daily and have completed all the missions for all three currently available tables. I can’t wait for the new one coming out this year. Giving users a chance to try the game before purchasing is so important and the only reason I bought it.  I hate buying an app without knowing what I’m getting into. Within the first few minutes of playing, I knew I had to have this one. It’s a winning concept, putting you inside a pinball table. It’s gorgeous and fun and so varied. Playing the missions is definitely the way to go. They teach you what all the doodads do in the game, how to trigger the many, many mini games, and allow you to hone your skills with a goal in mind. A word of caution: you’re given two skip tokens at the beginning that allow you to skip a mission you’re having problems completing, and I used those fairly early on without understanding that I’d never get another. If there is a way to earn another skip token, I never found it. However, after I finished all the missions, I went back and beat the two levels where I’d squandered those tokens and got them back. Holding onto them for the new table. There’s so much to do, so many different objectives, you won’t get bored with this game. I’ve got a couple of minor quibbles with the game, but not enough to take away a star. For example, the physics seem a little off to me. I’ve played a lot of racket sports in my day, enough to expect the ball to react to subtle changes in the racket angle, but it doesn’t. It will go generally in the right direction, but when it comes to hitting small targets, it seems like more luck is needed than skill. However, it’s not bad, just not perfect. The other thing that seems odd is how the ball goes to my right hand about 90% of the time. This is annoying because I’m left-handed. If the angle of the ball, say, at the first pitch is random, it should sometimes go to the left side. Otherwise, top notch.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the fantastic review! 🙌🎉If you’d like, you’re very welcome to join our community and follow development updates.

reviews.review_description: Fast-paced, stunning gameplay. You will sweat. Great fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! 😊  We're glad you're enjoying the game! Feel free to join our community to stay updated and share your experience! 🎮💬

reviews.review_description:
Why just 2 stars if "else top!" you may ask?
Well, the glitch, where the ball goes through the racket is incredibly frustrating and has not yet been fixed after several months. 
This bug is a huge fun-killer which keeps me from playing the game since months now. I will gladly add the missing 3 stars if this issue is resolved.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback!
The game has just been updated.

In the latest Update 1.96, we’ve completely rewritten the racket–ball collision system, which should finally eliminate the issue where the ball could pass through the racket. We’d love to hear if the new version improves your experience!

reviews.review_description: Great game

reviews.review_description:
Besides Golf+ the most addicting VR-game for me. Incredible amount of detail. Ball physics are great IMO and choice of speed/difficulty level 
guarantees long-lasting fun. Great music too which is not boring after hours of playing (and I'm a musician!!). Every table got something I like. Mini-Games are fun too (would love to play the western city shooting longer..). Slight fitness factor is a plus too. All in all worth every penny & more (until now, additional tables were all free - can't wait for "Speed"). I can’t recommend it enough. Thanks & compliments to the developers.

reviews.review_title: Great fun, but a few issues need fixing
reviews.review_description:
I'll start my review by saying that the game is a lot of fun. The three boards are very engaging and give your arms a good workout. I love the design elements, level challenges, sound, and graphics. The pirate level is a standout.  Western is a lot of fun.  The space level is my least favorite.  The space level feels very tight and claustrophobic.  The space level needs that room to be expanded in some way.  There's a feeling of it being too cramped with too many things for the ball to hit that are way too close together.
The only other thing that detracts from the game is instances where the ball clearly is going through the paddle.  It doesn't happen all the time, but when it does, it's noticeable and ruins the game.  I've noticed that if your racket is close to, or just outside, the roomscale boundary, you'll lose the ball.  Those of us with limited play space need to have this fixed.  Also, more often than not, the ball tends to be too close to the ground of the board level.  I've lost a lot of balls that are going through the paddle when the ball is low.  For example, if your paddle is just at, or somewhat below, the ground of the level, it's like the ball doesn't recognize the paddle is there.
If the space level can be expanded a bit so that it does not feel so cramped, and this "ball not contacting the paddle" issue can be resolved, you'd have a 5-star stunner of a game.
Lastly, to give people more time playing the game without the worry of lost balls, please just create an "Infinite Ball" difficulty setting.  I can't speak for anyone else, but sometimes I want to paddle the ball all over the place, and if I lose the ball, I don't care because it'll continue indefinitely until I manually quit the game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! We’re glad you’re enjoying the game.
The game is still in active development, so we’ll keep your suggestions in mind.

Feel free to join our community to share more feedback, connect with other players, and stay up to date on updates.
You can also send any suggestions directly to us at duovrsup@gmail.com

reviews.review_title: What happened to the height level?
reviews.review_description: Not sure if this is supposed to be a feature but the games height level seems off  I have to stoop down to reach the control & in the game my head almost touches the ceiling

Hi Devs!
I’ve never played single-player games because I’ve always loved the social aspect of gaming. That said, I absolutely love this game—it’s so immersive. My two favorites are pinball and tennis, and when I saw that this VR game combines both, I went crazy with joy. You’ve done an amazing job; I still love it to this day, and ever since the Wild West map was released, I just can’t stop playing. :)

The only thing that made me a bit sad with the latest update is that I used to love using the blue paddles, but now, when I select the blue paddles, I no longer get tennis rackets in my hands, but bumpers instead. If I switch to yellow or red, I get regular tennis rackets, but I’d love to play with the blue tennis rackets.

I’d like to ask if this is something I can change in the settings (i tried everything), or if it was done intentionally.

Thank you so much for your help!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! 😊 We're thrilled you're enjoying the game!

Regarding the blue paddles - it’s already been fixed in the latest update! Thanks for your patience, and feel free to join our community to stay updated and connect with other players! 🎮🤝

reviews.review_description: It's probably one of my favourite VR games that I've tried so far. It's a good workout and lots of fun. Dev's are very responsive too which is great. Looking forward to more maps and new features!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 😊
Feel free to join our community to share tips and connect with other players! 🎮💬

reviews.review_description: I’ve never purchased a game the instant I saw it. I also had a discount code I decided not to use because I really want to support this developer and encourage more games like this. It’s super fun, unique and I hope the developer keeps adding more content. I can see myself spending a lot of time and burning a lot of calories playing. Great game!

Update:
Thanks for the response, I couldn't be more excited to hear this! I know what I'll be Achievement hunting this summer! 


Great concept done very well! The minigames are a lot of fun. Only thing missing is Quest Achievements!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your review! 😊 We're glad you're enjoying the game! 
As for achievements - they’re actually in the game! Look behind you at the wall to see them. To learn how to unlock each one, grab the small trophy slightly behind you on the right. 🏆🎮
Feel free to join our community to connect with other players and stay updated.

reviews.review_description:
Racket Pinball has grown up into an absolutely fantastic app! Even in the very early access, it was pretty great - using a racket in each hand to keep the pinball in play within a couple of different classic pinball setups (a space themed and a pirate themed table). 

With the addition of a bunch of functionality (including being able to adjust the rackets to your preferred grip - a real game changer!), a Wild West themed table and (best of all IMHO) the "mission mode" (which is really a fabulously fun sneaky way to give you an in depth tutorial for how to score big) the app has matured into something better than the sum of its parts. It is SO STINKING FUN! So fun, in fact, that I don't notice that I am sweating LOL (the only way to keep me active LMAO). 

Kudos to the developers - this has become a really well designed and fun to play app. I see that it is still considered early access - I can't wait to see where it ends up! 

Highly recommend :-)

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the awesome review! 🙌 We’re glad you’re enjoying the updates and having fun with Mission Mode and the new table! Feel free to join our community to stay connected! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_title: Well the update is finally here!
reviews.review_description:
The 2 existing tables or boards.. or rooms :D left me wanting more.  The Pirates one was my favorite of the two.  Now we have the Western one and it is great!  I can say now that this is worth the full price! 

A great feature of this game us being able to customize the way the ball acts- from easy going to insane.  Either way, they're both a challenge. 

Good job devs.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiastic review! We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the new Western table! We also invite you to join our community to share your thoughts, connect with other players, and stay updated on the latest news! 🎮✨

reviews.review_description: This game is tons of fun and lots of objectives. Only down side is there’s only 3 venues. I’d like to see some add on’s soon.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the great review! 😊 We’re happy you’re enjoying the game. Feel free to join our community to stay updated and share your ideas! 🎮✨

reviews.review_description: This game is what I think of when I think VR Games.  This is a perfect mix of Pinball and Racquetball.  Love the look of all three locations!  There is lots to look at and learn what is needed to advance in the workflow of each section.  I did see an update, so I'll have to check that out.  Only thing it needs is a fix where the ball hits the paddle sometimes.  I know it sounds like that would be on me but I've watch the ball pass right through my paddle and at a point where I really needed to have my paddle come in contact, any contact, with the ball.  Poof!  I hit nothing!  This can be super frustrating...  Especially when the game depends on completing task to advance.  Maybe fixes are already in the works.  But, fix the ball misses issue and this will be my new go to have fun and exercise my brain game.  Otherwise it's a five star for sure.  Great visual fun!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review — we’re so glad you’re enjoying the game! 
We fixed the tracking issue in update 1.68, so the ball should no longer go through the paddle.
Feel free to join our community to share more feedback, connect with other players, and stay up to date on updates.

reviews.review_description: You are the flippers! This game is fantastic. The mechanics are perfect. The pinball boards are responsive and full of surprises. The game is simple and challenging. If you love pinball and/or love racket games - this is for you. I played for 2 hours and it felt like 5 minutes. It also has a ‘campaign’ like experience. If you do the trial you will buy because it is just very well done. I used to play Eleven as a warm up game, but this quickly took its place! But like I said, I ended up hooked and played it all night. It’s just sooooo good! I wish  I knew the Devs - I would gladly buy them a cold beer in appreciation for such a great addition to my library. Cheers!

reviews.review_title: Fun game, great twist on pinball
reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: I figured out the issue I having. I was swinging way too hard and fast. You have to swing slow, or the ball will go through your paddle. Some tutorials would be helpful. Bumped my original rating from a 3 to a 4

ORIGINAL: I really want to love this game, and it is a lot of fun when it works. But half the time the ball goes right through the racket… extremely frustrating, and the makes the missions impossible. Hoping it is fixed in future updates.

developer_response.body: Could you write to us and provide more details at duovrsup@gmail.com?

reviews.review_description: I bought this on a friend’s recommendation, and I’m loving it! Combining racket play with pinball is brilliant. So much fun and it keeps you moving. I’m hoping to see more pinball scenarios developed for this game in the future!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! 🙌 We’re glad you’re enjoying the game! Feel free to join our community to stay connected! 🎮🔥

reviews.review_title: I’ve Never Smashed Buy Game So Fast
reviews.review_description: This is my first review, and I have purchased a number of games .   I started with the free trial and ended up purchasing it before it even expired.   The game is phenomenal and it gets me moving in such an exhilarating way that I don’t realize I’ve broken a sweat until I’m finished.  If you’re of the age where you grew up on pinball or, I suspect, if you’re a fan of tennis or ping pong, this game is for you.   It’s literally pinball that puts you in the center of the action.   Did the ball escape into an empty spot ?  That’s all on you, as your flippers are the rackets in your hands.  Whether you’re exploring space or collecting treasure with pirates, it’s a load of fun even for this 43 year old couch potato.   I can’t wait for the Wild West table!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your enthusiastic review! We also invite you to join our community to share your thoughts, connect with other players, and stay updated on the latest news! 🎮✨

reviews.review_title: Too bad, the ball doesn't go where you'r
reviews.review_description:
Thank you for responding, I didn't know, there's a selection of different rackets not just their color. Each racket has different precision properties.
The idea is original and fun you are inside a pinball where the ball bounces crazy, takes paths and comes on the other hand trying that when it comes to you you are attentive and does not sneak without returning it as in a real pinball. There are also different destinations such as lighting 4 lamps hitting with the ball.
My rating changed to 4 stars.
Thank you for responding.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We also invite you to join our community to share your thoughts, connect with other players, and stay updated on the latest news! 🎮✨

reviews.review_title: A more accessible way to play pinball
reviews.review_description:
No more helplessly staring at the ball as it plummets in the middle, out of reach for the paddles. Sure, there is tilting but that's like punching a snack dispenser when your selection stuck, the digital iteration of the mechanic doesn't feel any better either. Here you can move freely to hit the ball with rackets giving you more control and better accuracy. 

Being dropped onto the bottom of a machine surface is super immersive and the tables come with all the typical intricate eye candy artwork, moving parts, triggers and flashing lights you can expect from a real machine. The mission mode does a great job at guiding you through the table rules 1 by 1 to make you understand the scoring system and perform better and faster at activating events and completing them before they are over. There are multiple ball physic and speed intensity to pick from as well as 3 different racket type (which feel the same tbh) to suit your play style. 

This has no right to play as good as it does, there is nothing sacrificed in the authentic pinball experience to make it work (maybe tables with upper playfield can't be done).  
The new western table is the best of all and it has been polished into a real diamond with all the community feedback and a sedulous dev team rapidly responding and tweaking the game. 

I assume the mission/achievement artwork is AI generated and while it is like 10% of the whole presentation and does not affect the gameplay at all, it does make me feel a bit dead inside. I find the space table horrible by design too. The 25% bonus score on remaining balls incentivize passive play and the leaderboard only showing your own position and score is underwhelming too. 
Could totally see myself play this for all eternity if the team will keep making more and more DLC tables to it on a semi-regular schedule.

I didn’t know what to expect out of this game so I took a chance and now I regret I didn’t buy it sooner. I love this game and it was hard for me to stop playing. It’s full of entertainment. This game is like playing racket ball and pinball and also has a shooting part it takes you to. So much fun 👍🏻

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! 🙌 We're so glad you took a chance and are loving the mix of action and fun! 🎾🎯🎉 Don’t forget to join our community to share your experience and stay connected with fellow players! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Here’s a fun and creative take on the classic pinball game—except this time, you’re the paddle! Instead of controlling flippers on a machine, you’ll wield two paddles to hit and direct the ball.

It’s a unique blend of pinball, racket sports, and even a bit of goalkeeping. While none of these concepts are entirely new, combining them creates an unexpectedly addictive experience!

For fans of racket sports, you’ll appreciate the twist: this game has you using both hands to control the paddles, turning each play session into a rapid rally, much like a thrilling match. Your main goal? Don’t let the ball slip past you! Letting it get behind your paddles costs you one precious chance, making your defensive skills just as important as your offensive strikes.

What makes it even more exciting is the modern pinball twist. By aiming your hits at specific areas, you can trigger multiplier bonuses, high-score rewards, and other special events. It’s a challenge that rewards precision and strategic shot placement, where angling the ball perfectly is more important than just hitting it hard.

The game supports multiple languages, including Chinese, and is designed for ease of play. All you need is a space wide enough to stretch your arms—no extra setup required. A tutorial mode is also available to guide players step by step, making it easy to grasp the scoring system and discover the best strategies to rack up high scores.

Currently, there are two available themes: a pirate-themed table and a sci-fi star battle table. Both offer unique missions and challenges, with more to come! According to the developers, the full release next year will include four tables, and future DLCs will likely expand the lineup.

Even with just two themes available, each table offers incredible replay value. You can pick different missions, focus on high-score routes, and just keep going, much like a traditional pinball machine. It’s a game you’ll find yourself hooked on, session after session!

Whether you’re a fan of pinball or looking for something fresh and fun, this game is worth checking out. Get ready to step into the action—literally—and let the rallies begin!

developer_response.body: Thank you for such an in-depth review! We’re thrilled you enjoyed the unique blend of gameplay elements and found it addictive. Stay tuned for the upcoming tables, and don’t forget to join our community to share your experiences and ideas! 🎮✨😊

reviews.review_description: Only two themes so far (Pirate and Sci-fi) but the attention to detail is fantastic! Feels like you really crawled inside of a pinball machine. Cowboy theme coming soon and if they ever do Medieval I might never leave the game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great feedback! We're thrilled you’re enjoying the immersive details.😊 Don’t forget to join our community to share your experiences and stay updated on future updates! 🎮✨

reviews.review_description:
First of all, I love playing pinball sims. I played the space environment for some hours. It feels quite strange to play since it appears that when you hit the ball it locks onto a target in the approximate direction. I felt this especially during the asteroid missions. I always hit targets behind the asteroids. Pinball is about skill and learning. This is something different.

Update: I tried to find out how the physics is modeled by some testing since it doesn't feel like using a racket. It seems that the direction of movement of the racket has an big impact on the ball, like the surface having infinite friction. The angle of the racket appears to having no or only minor impact on the ball.I think plates at the nuckles would be better suitable than rackets for this.
Also the physics of the ball movement under gravity appears quite strange. I don't think suitable equations are used. In addition, there seems be no spin of the ball modeled.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We're sorry to hear you feel this way. The game is still under active development, and we're continuously working to improve and expand it. We appreciate your patience and hope you'll stick with us as we make progress! We also invite you to join our community to share your thoughts, connect with other players, and stay updated on the latest news! 🎮✨😊

reviews.review_title: A good beginning - hope there's more
reviews.review_description:
Overall, a good start - but I hope there will be at least 4 tables like Bounce Arcade (currently only 2).   The graphics are interesting and complex - but they are a little fuzzy - hopefully that will be fixed.    

One thing that would be really nice to keep the game interesting would be to add multiplayer.  Perhaps each person controls one of the rackets? (one controls the left, the other player controls the right).   Or even better - give each player 2 rackets and make the table twice as wide, and add a 2nd ball.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind feedback and great ideas! We're glad you're enjoying the start and appreciate your suggestions. We also invite you to join our community to share your thoughts, connect with other players, and stay updated on the latest news! 🎮✨

reviews.review_title: This is what VR does best
reviews.review_description: It's one of those ideas that once it's made, it's so obvious. Another successful fusion enabled by VR. It's pretty well executed here and it looks like it's still being improved too. I love racquetball, I love pinball, now I can play both at the same time.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your amazing review! We're so glad you're enjoying the fusion of racquetball and pinball in VR.  Don’t forget to join our community to share your experiences and stay updated on future updates! 🎮✨😊

reviews.review_description: I had a great time with this game and I have to say, I really enjoy it. The gameplay is well-designed: if you’re a pinball fan like me, you’ll find the true spirit of the classic game here. It’s especially fun to play pinball with paddles, where you have to hit hard to reach the targets and score points. The game is excellent. My only regret is about the graphics, which appear a bit blurry on the Quest 3, and the limited number of environments – only two out of three are currently accessible. The game’s price also feels a bit high for its content. For all these reasons, I’m giving it 4 out of 5 stars.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback and for sharing your thoughts! We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the gameplay and finding the true pinball spirit in the game. As the game is still in Early Access, it’s actively being developed, and two additional tables are planned for future updates. Stay tuned for even more exciting content!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled you enjoyed the game and appreciate your support. Have fun with those missions and keep flipping!

reviews.review_title: Game, set and match, no tilting
reviews.review_description: Pinball Tennis VR is an absolute blast! The game combines the thrill of fast-paced tennis with the classic fun of pinball, creating a truly unique VR experience. The mechanics feel smooth and intuitive, making it easy to get into the flow of the game right away. I love how each level (can't wait for Far West!!!) has creative pinball-inspired obstacles and interactive elements that add a fun challenge to every match. The visuals are vibrant, and the sound effects really make you feel like you're right in the action. There is a mission mode, some mini-games to unlock.This is a must-play for VR fans looking for something fresh and exciting—highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the fantastic feedback! We're thrilled you’re enjoying the blend of tennis and pinball, and we can’t wait to bring you Wild West level soon. Thanks for recommending it—stay tuned for more updates! 🎮✨

reviews.review_description:
I've never played tennis, but I love pinball, so the title immediately caught my eye. An original idea and great execution. The mechanics reflect those known from classic machines, there are a lot of modes to discover and there is also a challenge if you want to get big scores or fight for achievements. You can also choose the appropriate level of difficulty for yourself.
Currently, there are two arenas available, Space and Pirates (the third is on the way), each is unique and colorful. The gameplay is fluid and diverse, hitting the ball with rockets is really fun. You can feel the flow.
Additionally, you can start mini-games in each arena.
In addition to the classic arcade mode, there is also a scenario mode, in which I learned the rules of the game in an accessible way.
A great game. Both for longer play and for a short break from work. I can't wait for the next arenas.

developer_response.body: "Thank you so much for your detailed and positive feedback! It’s great to know the game fits both quick breaks and longer play sessions. 😊 We also invite you to join our community to share your thoughts, connect with other players, and stay updated on the latest news! 🎮✨"
